nodes.context: Criminal organization and extortion ring operating on New York's Lower East Side during early 20th century.
Italian immigrant criminal gang that used Black Hand methods in New York City.
Italian immigrant criminal gang that used Black Hand methods in New York City.

edges.evidence_quote: This method had been used in New York City by Neapolitan Camorristi , Sicilian mafiosi , and other Italian immigrant criminal gangs who preyed on fellow Italian immigrants as the Black Hand .
edges.context: The Yiddish Black Hand adopted the extortion method previously used by Neapolitan Camorristi.
